etymology.description: 大(大) (dà, "big") + 十(十) (shí, "ten") = combination of ten and large symbolizing wholeness -> root
etymology.interpretation: The character 夲 combines 大(大) (dà, "big") and 十(十) (shí, "ten") to create the idea of something fundamental or whole, which is why it is associated with the meaning "root."
